name: Safari MCP Server
description: Connects AI agents to a live Safari window for web debugging: DOM inspection, network monitoring, console logs, screenshots, and JS evaluation. Official Apple/WebKit MCP server.

skills.name: DOM Inspection
skills.description: Inspects the rendered DOM tree of a live Safari page so agents can read structure, styles, and accessibility state.

skills.name: Network Monitoring
skills.description: Captures network requests, responses, and timings from a Safari session for debugging load and API behavior.

skills.name: Console & JS Eval
skills.description: Reads console output and evaluates arbitrary JavaScript in the Safari page to verify user-facing state.
